messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>太空射击游戏</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        
        body {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background: #0a0a1a;
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        #gameCanvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    
    <script>
        // 初始化Canvas
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;
        
        // 游戏状态
        const GameState = {
            MENU: 'menu',
            PLAYING: 'playing',
            PAUSED: 'paused',
            GAMEOVER: 'gameover'
        };
        
        // 游戏变量
        let gameState = GameState.MENU;
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('highScore') || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;
        
        // 玩家
        const player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 20,
            y: canvas.height - 80,
            width: 40,
            height: 40,
            speed: 300,
            color: '#4fd1c5',
            movingLeft: false,
            movingRight: false
        };
        
        // 子弹数组
        let bullets = [];
        const bulletSpeed = 400;
        const bulletWidth = 4;
        const bulletHeight = 15;
        let canShoot = true;
        let shootCooldown = 0;
        const shootCooldownTime = 0.3;
        
        // 敌人数组
        let enemies = [];
        const enemyWidth = 30;
        const enemyHeight = 30;
        const enemySpeed = 100;
        let enemySpawnTimer = 0;
        const enemySpawnInterval = 1.5;
        
        // 爆炸效果数组
        let explosions = [];
        
        // 输入处理
        const keys = {};
        
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;
            
            if (pressed) {
                if (key === 'ArrowLeft' || key === 'a') {
                    player.movingLeft = true;
                }
                if (key === 'ArrowRight' || key === 'd') {
                    player.movingRight = true;
                }
                if (key === ' ' && gameState === GameState.PLAYING && canShoot) {
                    shootBullet();
                }
                if (key === 'Enter' || key === ' ') {
                    if (gameState === GameState.MENU) {
                        startGame();
                    } else if (gameState === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                        resetGame();
                    }
                }
                if (key === 'p' || key === 'P') {
                    if (gameState === GameState.PLAYING) {
                        gameState = GameState.PAUSED;
                    } else if (gameState === GameState.PAUSED) {
                        gameState = GameState.PLAYING;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                if (key === 'ArrowLeft' || key === 'a') {
                    player.movingLeft = false;
                }
                if (key === 'ArrowRight' || key === 'd') {
                    player.movingRight = false;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 键盘事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });
        
        // 射击函数
        function shootBullet() {
            bullets.push({
                x: player.x + player.width / 2 - bulletWidth / 2,
                y: player.y,
                width: bulletWidth,
                height: bulletHeight,
                speed: bulletSpeed
            });
            canShoot = false;
            shootCooldown = shootCooldownTime;
        }
        
        // 生成敌人
        function spawnEnemy() {
            const x = Math.random() * (canvas.width - enemyWidth);
            enemies.push({
                x: x,
                y: -enemyHeight,
                width: enemyWidth,
                height: enemyHeight,
                speed: enemySpeed + Math.random() * 50,
                color: `hsl(${Math.random() * 60 + 350}, 70%, 50%)`
            });
        }
        
        // 创建爆炸效果
        function createExplosion(x, y) {
            explosions.push({
                x: x,
                y: y,
                radius: 5,
                maxRadius: 30,
                alpha: 1,
                speed: 100
            });
        }
        
        // 开始游戏
        function startGame() {
            gameState = GameState.PLAYING;
            score = 0;
            resetGameObjects();
        }
        
        // 重置游戏对象
        function resetGameObjects() {
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - player.width / 2;
            player.y = canvas.height - 80;
            bullets = [];
            enemies = [];
            explosions = [];
            enemySpawnTimer = 0;
            canShoot = true;
            shootCooldown = 0;
        }
        
        // 重置游戏
        function resetGame() {
            if (score > highScore) {
                highScore = score;
                localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
            }
            startGame();
        }
        
        // 更新函数
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== GameState.PLAYING) return;
            
            // 更新射击冷却
            if (!canShoot) {
                shootCooldown -= deltaTime;
                if (shootCooldown <= 0) {
                    canShoot = true;
                }
            }
            
            // 玩家移动
            if (player.movingLeft) {
                player.x -= player.speed * deltaTime;
            }
            if (player.movingRight) {
                player.x += player.speed * deltaTime;
            }
            
            // 边界检查
            if (player.x < 0) player.x = 0;
            if (player.x > canvas.width - player.width) {
                player.x = canvas.width - player.width;
            }
            
            // 更新子弹
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed * deltaTime;
                if (bullets[i].y < -bullets[i].height) {
                    bullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
            
            // 生成敌人
            enemySpawnTimer += deltaTime;
            if (enemySpawnTimer >= enemySpawnInterval) {
                spawnEnemy();
                enemySpawnTimer = 0;
            }
            
            // 更新敌人
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed * deltaTime;
                
                // 敌人触底
                if (enemies[i].y > canvas.height) {
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                    gameState = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                    }
                    continue;
                }
                
                // 碰撞检测：子弹 vs 敌人
                for (let j = bullets.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                    if (checkCollision(bullets[j], enemies[i])) {
                        createExplosion(enemies[i].x + enemies[i].width / 2, enemies[i].y + enemies[i].height / 2);
                        enemies.splice(i, 1);
                        bullets.splice(j, 1);
                        score += 1;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                // 碰撞检测：玩家 vs 敌人
                if (i < enemies.length && checkCollision(player, enemies[i])) {
                    createExplosion(player.x + player.width / 2, player.y + player.height / 2);
                    gameState = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // 更新爆炸效果
            for (let i = explosions.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                explosions[i].radius += explosions[i].speed * deltaTime;
                explosions[i].alpha -= deltaTime * 2;
                if (explosions[i].alpha <= 0) {
                    explosions.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // 碰撞检测
        function checkCollision(obj1, obj2) {
            return obj1.x < obj2.x + obj2.width &&
                   obj1.x + obj1.width > obj2.x &&
                   obj1.y < obj2.y + obj2.height &&
                   obj1.y + obj1.height > obj2.y;
        }
        
        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // 绘制背景
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            // 绘制星星背景
            drawStars();
            
            // 根据游戏状态绘制
            switch (gameState) {
                case GameState.MENU:
                    drawMenu();
                    break;
                case GameState.PLAYING:
                    drawGame();
                    break;
                case GameState.PAUSED:
                    drawGame();
                    drawPause();
                    break;
                case GameState.GAMEOVER:
                    drawGame();
                    drawGameOver();
                    break;
            }
        }
        
        // 绘制星星
        function drawStars() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)';
            for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
                const x = (i * 37) % canvas.width;
                const y = (i * 53) % canvas.height;
                const size = (i % 3) + 1;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(x, y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }
        
        // 绘制菜单
        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            ctx.font = 'bold 36px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('太空射击', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);
            
            ctx.font = '18px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText('按 空格键 或 回车键 开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            
            ctx.font = '16px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillText('← → 或 A D 移动', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('空格键 射击', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 70);
            ctx.fillText('P 键 暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 100);
            
            ctx.font = '14px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#888888';
            ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height - 50);
        }
        
        // 绘制游戏
        function drawGame() {
            // 绘制玩家
            ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(player.x + player.width / 2, player.y);
            ctx.lineTo(player.x + player.width, player.y + player.height);
            ctx.lineTo(player.x, player.y + player.height);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            
            // 绘制子弹
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            for (const bullet of bullets) {
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            }
            
            // 绘制敌人
            for (const enemy of enemies) {
                ctx.fillStyle = enemy.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(enemy.x + enemy.width / 2, enemy.y + enemy.height / 2, enemy.width / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                
                // 敌人眼睛
                ctx.fillStyle = '#000000';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(enemy.x + enemy.width / 2 - 5, enemy.y + enemy.height / 2 - 3, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.arc(enemy.x + enemy.width / 2 + 5, enemy.y + enemy.height / 2 - 3, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
            
            // 绘制爆炸效果
            for (const explosion of explosions) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(explosion.x, explosion.y, explosion.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 200, 100, ${explosion.alpha})`;
                ctx.fill();
            }
            
            // 绘制得分
            drawScore();
        }
        
        // 绘制得分
        function drawScore() {
            ctx.font = 'bold 20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score.toString(), canvas.width / 2 + 25, 30);
        }
        
        // 绘制暂停
        function drawPause() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            ctx.font = 'bold 36px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            
            ctx.font = '18px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText('按 P 键继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 50);
        }
        
        // 绘制游戏结束
        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            
            ctx.font = 'bold 36px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 3);
            
            ctx.font = '24px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillText(`最终得分: ${score}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            
            ctx.font = '18px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            
            ctx.font = '18px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillText('按 空格键 或 回车键 重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 100);
        }
        
        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            
            update(deltaTime);
            render();
            
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }
        
        // 初始化游戏
        function init() {
            lastTime = performance.now();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }
        
        // 启动游戏
        init();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
